sample.title: Ahasss
sample.plot: Jake, a young houseboy, falls for his boss' battered wife. As he helps her escape from her abusive husband, things get wild, messy, and bloody.

sample.title: Zombie Fight Club
sample.plot: It's the end of the century at a corner of the city in a building riddled with crime - Everyone in the building has turned into zombies. After Jenny's boyfriend is killed in a zombie attack, she faces the challenge of surviving in the face of adversity. In order to stay alive, she struggles with Andy to flee danger.

sample.title: Bad City
sample.plot: When a corrupt businessman decides to run for mayor and starts eliminating opponents from the rival mafia, a former police captain serving time for murder is secretly released and put in charge of a special task force to arrest him.

sample.title: The Tank
sample.plot: After mysteriously inheriting an abandoned coastal property, Ben and his family accidentally unleash an ancient, long-dormant creature that terrorized the entire region-including his own ancestors-for generations.

sample.title: Armed Response
sample.plot: A team of highly trained operatives find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound after its AI is suddenly shut down. The crew begins to experience strange and horrific phenomena as they attempt to uncover what killed the previous team.

sample.title: Based on a True Story
sample.plot: A writer goes through a tough period after the release of her latest book, as she gets involved with an obsessive admirer.

sample.title: The Goldsmith
sample.plot: A trio of desperate criminals break into the isolated country house of an elderly goldsmith and his wife. But their chosen targets turn out to be far less defenseless than they seem.

sample.title: Snake Island: Python
sample.plot: A group of young people go on a graduation trip to a remote island. Unbeknownst to them, the island is the home of a monstrous-sized python. Though the kindly caretaker tries to help the young people, will they all be able to surv...

sample.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers the Movie: Secrets Revealed
sample.plot: A behind the scenes look at the making of 'Mighty Morphin Power Rangers the Movie'.

sample.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
sample.plot: Follows a naval officer who stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he felt was acting in an unstable way, putting both the ship and its crew in danger.

sample.title: I Don't Like Younger Men 4
sample.plot: Yoo-jin runs a coffee shop. One day he runs into his childhood friend Mi-ae. She is unemployed and helps Yoo-jin at the coffee shop. Min-soo stops by to see his daughter, but realizes that he is attracted to Mi-ae.

sample.title: Kabayo
sample.plot: Laurene wants to elevate her seven-year relationship with Conrad. When Easton comes into the picture, she believes she is the perfect addition to their sexual relationship.

sample.title: Porno
sample.plot: An assassin, a porn dubber and a transgender. Three souls. One explicit illusion. To find the ultimate joy in their empty lives. A safe haven, where passion and love mean humanity, ecstasy means enlightenment, and the soul is the ...

sample.title: Zebra Lounge
sample.plot: The upper middle class Wendy Barnet and Alan Barnet are married with children and live in the suburbs. Alan is disputing a promotion with his co-worker Neil Bradley (Vincent Corazza) but his relationship with Wendy is boring. They decide to buy a swingers magazine and contact an attractive couple to rekindle their sex life. The couple Louise and Jack Bauer schedule a date with them at the Zebra Lounge and they go to a place where they swap wives. Wendy and Alan feel satisfied with the encounter but Louise and Jack want to meet them again. Soon they find how persistent Jack is.

sample.title: A Delicious Flight
sample.plot: An innocent actress runs away from the scandal with an idol, the impudent idol that ruined her career, a passionate manager who is devoted to her and his ex-girlfriend who is now a sexy stewardess. These four that should never be together run into each other in an airplane. No one can run away and the most cheeky and erotic things happen here.

sample.title: Diary of a Sex Addict
sample.plot: A middle-aged chef in a luxurious restaurant reveals to his shrink his double personality: He is an impeccable family man who loves his wife and son and at the same time a sexually hungry person who seeks pleasure at any time with any woman.

sample.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
sample.plot: Jimmy Neutron is a boy genius and way ahead of his friends, but when it comes to being cool, he's a little behind. All until one day when his parents, and parents all over Earth are kidnapped by aliens, it's up to him to lead all the children of the world to rescue their parents.

sample.title: Spy Hard
sample.plot: General Rancor is threatening to destroy the world with a missile he is hiding at his secret base. But to complete his goal, he needs a special computer chip, invented by the scientist Prof. Ukrinsky. Special Agent Dick Steele is assigned to the case, in order to prevent the worst. He teams up with Ukrinsky's daughter Veronique, who happens to be a KGB agent.

sample.title: Sons of Summer
sample.plot: Four surfing sons plan a tribute 'surfari' to a small beach town for one of their fathers murdered three decades earlier. But some road trips are to die for.

sample.title: Babe: Pig in the City
sample.plot: After Babe's great victory in the shepherding contest, Farmer Arthur Hoggett turns down all offers to make money with his pig's talents. But when he gets hurt severely in the well, his wife has to take up farming. She does her best but cannot meet the bank's requirements, which results in the necessity of getting back to Babe. Soon, Esme Hoggett is sitting in a plane headed for "the" city. There, Babe unwillingly causes deep trouble. He has to stay with Mrs. Hoggett in the only hotel in town that accepts pets. Friendly neighbours send officials who catch all animals from the hotel: Cats, dogs, chimpanzees and many others. Babe, who managed to stay free, decides to help his new friends and gets unexpected help - not only by Ferdinand, who flew all the way to the city.

sample.title: Deep Rising
sample.plot: When a band of ruthless hijackers invade the world's most luxurious cruise ship, they're shocked to discover the passengers have mysteriously vanished! But that doesn't mean they are alone! Something terrifying is lurking just out of sight: a deadly force from the unexplored depths of the ocean that begins to snatch the horrified intruders one by one!

sample.title: Naked Poison
sample.plot: Office worker, ugly and shy Man, not only suffers from a lack of success in women, but is also humiliated by everyone around. He gets his kicks taking sneaky snaps of his female co-workers, spying on his neighbors having rough sex; things change, however, when he mixes ingredients from his late grandfather's medicine shop to create the ultimate aphrodisiac drug.

sample.title: Spy Kids
sample.plot: Gregorio and Ingrid are the two greatest secret agents the world has ever known: masters of disguise, mavens of invention, able to stop wars before they even start. Working for separate countries, they are sent to eliminate their most dangerous enemy...each other. But in an exotic corner of the world when they finally come face to face, they fall in love instead and embark on the most dangerous mission they have ever faced: raising a family. Now nine years later, after their retirement, having exchanged the adventure of espionage for parenthood, Gregorio and Ingrid Cortez are called back in to action. When their former colleagues, the world's most formidable spies, start disappearing one by one, the Cortez's are forced to take on techno-wizard Fegan Floop and his evil, egg-headed sidekick, Minion. But when the unthinkable happens and they too disappear, unfortunately there are only two people in the world who can rescue them...their kids.

sample.title: The Great Arms Robbery
sample.plot: Agent Wen goes undercover to locate weapons for an arms dealer. He's attacked after finding them, so he teams up with his partner to recover the munitions and prevent disaster.

categories.label: cities shaped by crime and private fear
categories.description: Urban life is marked by corruption, gang influence, unsafe buildings, and the feeling that danger sits close to home rather than at a distant frontier. What you'll see: cramped flats, night streets, back rooms, police pressure, and households trying to keep violence outside the door.

categories.label: cold war habits lingering after the thaw
categories.description: Even as the old standoff fades, spies, missiles, secret files, and military chains of command still organise how states imagine danger. What you'll see: agents with aliases, hidden bases, court-martial rooms, coded exchanges, and officials treating suspicion as ordinary business.

categories.label: consumer gadgets entering every room
categories.description: Daily life is being rewired by compact electronics, surveillance devices, computer chips, and automated systems that promise convenience while widening control. What you'll see: screens glowing in homes and compounds, bugs and cameras, clever household machines, and people trusting devices they barely understand.

categories.label: mass media turning scandal into currency
categories.description: Fame, publicity, and entertainment publicity machines can make or ruin reputations with startling speed, and private troubles easily become public spectacle. What you'll see: idols, writers, backstage chatter, gossip, magazines, and careers shaken by rumour, obsession, and exposure.

categories.label: sex moving into the open market
categories.description: The decade treats desire less as a hidden matter of honour and more as something bought, advertised, discussed, and experimented with in urban life. What you'll see: coffee shops, swingers' ads, therapists' offices, erotic workplaces, porn studios, and relationships negotiated in franker terms.

categories.label: middle-class homes under money pressure
categories.description: Comfortable domestic life rests on loans, promotions, and steady wages, so injury, stalled advancement, or bad luck can quickly threaten the household. What you'll see: suburbs, bank demands, workplace rivalry, family kitchens, and respectable homes strained by bills and disappointment.

categories.label: global travel shrinking distance and danger
categories.description: Cheap flights, cruise ships, and holiday trips make movement across sea and sky feel routine, while also carrying strangers into sudden peril far from home. What you'll see: airplane cabins, luxury liners, island caretakers, graduation trips, and travellers discovering that leisure offers no safety.

categories.label: children raised inside branded modern plenty
categories.description: Many families inhabit a world of packaged entertainment, bright consumer goods, and child-centred comfort, where young people are expected to be clever, confident, and amused. What you'll see: colourful bedrooms, toys and snacks, wisecracking kids, suburban routines, and adventure framed by familiar comforts.

categories.label: old bloodlines haunting new property
categories.description: Modern families inherit houses, coastal land, and local secrets that carry older regional fears into the present, showing how the past still clings to place. What you'll see: abandoned estates, family lore, weathered caretakers, ancestral rumours, and newcomers uncovering what a district remembers.

categories.label: authority split between law and underworld
categories.description: Public order often depends on uneasy bargains among police, soldiers, businessmen, and criminal networks rather than on clean trust in institutions. What you'll see: special task forces, undercover deals, weapons caches, mayoral ambitions, and officials crossing lines they claim to defend.
